Hero.title: Turkey's First and Only Notary Approved Shipping Company
Hero.subtitle: Your belongings are transported under the guarantee of Demirhan, fully insured and notary certified. Just enjoy your new place.

Trust.notary_desc: With Turkey's only notary certified transport document, all your rights are legally guaranteed.
Trust.fleet_desc: We are at your service with modern vehicles with lifts and steel cases suitable for all sizes of goods.
Trust.time_desc: We are at your door on the day and time we promised. Professional transfer process without delay.

Services.title: Professional Moving Solutions
Services.subtitle: We perfectly meet all the transportation services you need with Demirhan quality.

Quote.title: Get a Quick Quote
Quote.subtitle: Specify where your belongings will be moved from and to, and we will instantly offer you the most suitable price and time plan.
Quote.privacy_note: By submitting, you accept the KVKK and Privacy Policy.

Testimonials.title: Customer Reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from our customers who experienced our notary-approved difference.

About.title: About Us
About.heading: Turkey's First Notary Approved Transportation Service
About.p1: As Demirhan Nakliyat, we are proud to be one of the companies offering the first notary-approved transportation service in Turkey to provide our customers with a safer and more transparent service.
About.p2: With the optionally prepared notary-approved contract, all details belonging to the moving process are officially recorded. Thus, the rights of both our customers and our company are secured, and the moving process is carried out in a completely reliable manner.
About.p3: Thanks to this application, our customers experience more trust, transparency, and professionalism during the moving process of their belongings.
About.p4: The address of safe moving: Demirhan Nakliyat

features.f1_desc: Our experienced team carefully packs your belongings and safely delivers them to your new address.
features.f2_desc: All your belongings are carefully protected against scratches, breakage, and damage during transport.
features.f3_desc: By being at your address on the specified day and time, we complete the moving process planned and fast.
features.f4_desc: Optionally, we secure the rights of both our customers and our company with a notary-approved contract.
features.f5_desc: By providing quality service at accessible prices, we prioritize the satisfaction of our customers.
features.f6_desc: At every stage of the moving process, our customers' satisfaction is our most important priority.

Footer.desc: Turkey's first and only notary approved shipping company. Your belongings are safe with us.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Contact us immediately for all your moving processes and questions.
Contact.success_msg: Your message has been received, we will get back to you soon.
